mod.name: Random Foreseer
page.title: Random Foreseer
page.description: Configure prediction features for random outcomes.
section.prediction.title: Prediction
section.prediction.description: Controls which random outcomes are shown before confirmation.
toggle.enable_transform_prediction.label: Predict transform results
toggle.enable_transform_prediction.descr: When enabled, deck transform confirmation previews show the exact card the current RNG will produce.
toggle.enable_potion_card_prediction.des: When enabled, random-card potion tooltips show the exact cards the current RNG will produce.
